notes.assign_modality: Exported as stable scaffold columns only: tran_id,event_type,gene_id,gene_short_name,gene_type,n.cells.
notes.prop_modality: PropModality is not exported as an exact parity artifact on this tiny dataset because canonical R returns Missing/NA modality labels while Python computes concrete labels.
notes.compare_values: Only gene-level CompareValues exact parity is exported in Task 7 via compare_values_gene.tsv; the splicing branch remains contract-only coverage in Phase 1.
notes.alignment: R SubsetSamples trims SplicePheno but leaves Exp wider; alignment_exp_subset_s1_s2.tsv stores the stable gene_id,s1,s2 slice.
